# UC-13.1.56 · Prometheus Service Discovery Refresh Failure by Mechanism

## Description

SD failures silently shrink the scrape pool and drop monitors.

## Value

Isolates which discovery provider broke after cloud credential or RBAC changes.

## Implementation

Increase log level for SD temporarily; redact secrets in messages.

## SPL

```spl
index=prometheus sourcetype="prometheus:log"
| search "discovery" AND ("Failed" OR "error" OR "cancel")
| rex field=msg "provider=(?<sd_provider>[^,\s]+)"
| stats count by sd_provider, host
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Pie chart (provider), Table (host × provider).

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
